entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content: Are you using MDK 24.11.x? Have you looked into the additional search options?

entry.title: SFCMP-23218 - Employee Central Data on Compensation Statements
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The 1H 2025 release has a compensation release item stating that we can add Employee Central data directly on the Compensation statements without adding the fields to the plan template.

Have few questions:

1. Is this feature applicable to Variable Pay Statements as well?
2. As per which date, the data from Employee Central will be shown? Will it take Templates' effective date or the statement generate date?

Can someone help me with these questions?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create a ATC variant S4 Hana 2022
entry.content: Remove Code Vulnerability Analizer

entry.title: Re: Error while copying ATC Variant "ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT"
entry.content: Remove Code Vulnerability Analizer

entry.title: Re: MDK - How to change the AccessoryType Icon on Grid ta...
entry.content:
MDK does not currently have the ability to customize the accessory image on a Data Table or Grid Table and as you mention there is no separate event for just that indicator.  Data Table and Grid Table have the indicator to help cue a user that clicking on a row will show more detail.

One option might be to put the table into a "delete" mode where a user could select one or more rows to be deleted.  Using an image columns and the row on click to select/deselect the items and then pressing a header or footer button to finalize and actually perform the delete.

entry.title: Re: Access Control Concern Regarding Journal Entry Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

Your use case could be solved with the new authorization concept of App Authorization Variants which was delivered with S/4HANA CE2502.

For more information about this new feature please review the below links:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53e36b5493804bcdb3f6f14de8b487dd/d45c96e6d9e2426187920bffb3287f45.html?version=2502.500

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/53e36b5493804bcdb3f6f14de8b487dd/e2b39fb01689420393931a9eb3f627ec.html?version=2502.500

Blog Post with details on how to work with App Authorization Variants:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/precise-control-of-fiori-app-access-with-the-app-authorization-variants/ba-p/13994744

Recording of the mentioned Webinar is available for registered users here:

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-2502-early-release-series-cross-technology-topics

 

For the particular use case of Manage Journal Entries F0717A and verification authorization the following AAVs should be assigned:

  • F0717A_TRAN + F8153_TRAN → DISPLAY + EDIT + VERIFY(SUBMIT) possibility
    • F0717A_TRAN - Manage Journal Entries
    • F8153_TRAN - Post General Journal Entries for Verification

Also note, that you should not allow/activate any of the AAVs for the old app F0717_xxxx as it could bring also other authorizations which enable also direct posting of journal entries.

Best Regards

Martin Krucky

entry.title: Re: Unable to load data from navigation while Onresume Sync and Auto Sync
entry.content: Can you elaborate on the flow a bit more. I am not following the sequence here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Cerrado 2025
entry.content: Eu estarei lá!!

entry.title: Does CrystalReportRuntime.jar and WebReport.jar support Crystal Report 2025 .rpt file
entry.content: We would like to design reports with Crystal Reports 2025 and, execute the report (.rpt) in a web application for displaying / exporting to the user. Does CrystalReportRuntime.jar and WebReport.jar SP31 support the Crystal Reports 2025 .rpt file?

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba User Provisioning Using SAP Identity Provisioning Service (IPS)
entry.content:
Thank you, Imran, for the detailed blog. However, I believe there is an error in the screenshots included in Section 3: Verify User Creation. It appears that the same screenshot has been pasted twice, and the screenshot for the `urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap.odm:2.0:User` schema values for the user is missing.

I also have one question. I have set up the integration with IAS (Identity Authentication Service) and IAG (Identity Access Governance) for Ariba User Provisioning. Everything looks fine except for the user attributes specific to Ariba, as mentioned in your blog. What is SAP's recommended source for these attribute values in IAS? I have been unable to find any blog or document that explains this scenario with a source system for IAS, such as SuccessFactors or another HR system. It would be great if SAP has any recommendations for the source system for IAS for this scenario.

entry.title: SAP Developer News April 10th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION 

Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/04/10/sap-developer-news-april-10th2025/ 

Shaping the Future of Data and AI with SAP HANA Cloud:  

  • Shaping the Future with Data and AI: SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine and Generative AI Toolkit: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogarticleprintpage/blog-id/technology-blog-sap/article-id/180448  
  • Generative AI Toolkit for SAP HANA Cloud: https://github.com/SAP/generative-ai-toolkit-for-sap-hana-cloud/blob/main/README.md  
  • LangChain integration for SAP HANA Cloud: https://pypi.org/project/langchain-hana/   
  • Invitation to join HANA Tech Con: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7316037624064819201/   

 

SAP Open Source Webinar Apeiro Reference Architecture  

  • Registration page: https://events.sap.com/apeiro-reference-architecture/en/registration.aspx  
  • LinkedIn post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/michael-ameling_neonephos-gardener-gardenlinux-activity-7312819875003985923-D7wZ/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAACgkg4UBF6JXngL8eiZlhbT4UQWinLeQkAo  
  • ApeiroRA: https://apeirora.eu/  
  • NeoNephos Foundation: https://neonephos.org/  

 

CAP March 8.9 Release  

  • Release Notes for March 8.9: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/mar25  
  • Major Release migration Guide: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/mar25#prepare-for-major-release  

Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students and lecturers: 

      -  Blog post for student learning hub: https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner-blog-posts/free-sap-certification-and-practice-systems-for-students-amp-lecturers/ba-p/14052493  

     - What is SAP: https://community.sap.com/t5/beginner-corner-blog-posts/how-and-where-do-you-start-a-consulting-career-in-sap/ba-p/221488  

 

Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025  

  • Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/welcome-to-sap-businessobjects-bi-2025/ba-p/14040695  

 

CHAPTER TITLES   

0:00 Intro  

00:10 Shaping the Future of Data and AI with SAP HANA Cloud  

1:55 SAP Open Source Webinar Apeiro Reference Architecture  

3:13 CAP March 8.9 Release  

4:55 Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students and lecturers 

7:50 Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Into] This is the SAP Developer News for April 10th, 2025.

[Witalij] We are delighted to inform you that two cool technologies, the Knowledge Graph Engine and the Generative AI Toolkit, have been launched in SAP HANA Cloud. The Knowledge Graph Engine enables you to model and analyze complex relationships within data stored in SAP HANA Cloud. Native RDF triple store support enables semantic data storage and querying using the resource description framework. It also enhances LLM responses by grounding them in business -specific knowledge stored within the knowledge graph, providing more accurate and contextually relevant outputs. A lot of smart words, I know, so you better try it yourself. I plan to make the new SAP CodeJam exercises available shortly. Let me know in the comments if you are interested. The Generative AI Toolkit simplifies the development of intelligent data applications by providing a natural language interface for creating in-database machine learning models, reducing the need for extensive coding from your cert. Although, following recent updates in the long-chain review process, our engineering team has published a new long-chain integration for SAP HANA Cloud package. You can now easily leverage features like in database embeddings, full-text search, and vector indexes directly within LongChain. Interested in discussing this and other aspects of SAP HANA? The very first HANA TechCon will take place at SAP Headquarter in Germany on July 10th. Please check the published agenda and register if you are interested. I'm looking forward to meeting you there.

[Ajay] Hello everyone, I have got some interesting news for the open source enthusiast. There is an upcoming SAP Open Source webinar on the topic Apeiro Reference Architecture, Strengthening Digital Sovereignty for Europe. It is on May 8th at 3 p.m. CESD. The Apeiro Reference Architecture is a part of initiative and aim to build a high-performance cloud edge infrastructure with open source standards. Peter Giese, head of SAP Open Source Program Office, will give you an overview on why and how this project has been transferred into the new NeoNephos Foundation, which will serve as a neutral entity dedicated to fostering, open collaboration, and governance. There is also a LinkedIn post by Michael Ameling explaining the NeoNephos Foundation, where several flagship open source projects such as Gardena, Garden Linux, and more are transferred to NeoNephos through this initiative. Vasu Chandrasekhara, Chief Product Owner of Apeiro, will explain the landscape of Apeiro reference architecture with an overview of the architecture and the components. Please find the registration links to the webinar in the description below.

[Kevin] A March 2025 release of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model is out. The new version 8.9 brings important changes to you. But before we dive in, I just wanted to remind you that there is a new CDS parser version coming out with the next major version 9.0. So make sure to comply to all the new changes and that your projects keep on running. You can use the new parser now by setting the new parser flag to true to try them out in your project today. So you might as well go ahead and do it. A new change with 8.9 brings you actions to generated child entities when  defining a composition of aspect. This is really nice bringing you action capabilities when reflecting document structures in your domain models. Recursive hierarchies and Fiori Tree Table support is out now available in beta, allowing you to serve read requests for the SAP Fiori Tree Table control. Version 8.9 is introducing a new CDS command, which is cds-up. CDS-up will build and deploy your CAP applications to Cloud Foundry. And if you need to deploy to Kyma, simply add the argument dash dash to Kubernetes to the end of the command. And the last thing I want to mention is that you can now use the cds deploy to HANA command for deploying to Kubernetes as well. So just add the argument of dash dash on Kubernetes this at the end of the command for the magic to begin. And there are more changes in the current release, which we aren't covering here. So make sure to read the official release notes on the CAP documentation page. And as always, the link is in the description below.

[Ebere] Hi, everyone. I've got some exciting news to share, especially if you’re a student just like me, working with SAP, or just curious to know what SAP is all about, the Learning Hub Student Edition is live. And the best part of it, it is free for all actively enrolled students. And here's what you can get. Full access to content available to customers, two certifications attempts, access to live expert sessions, hands-on cloud-based training systems, plus content to help you get certified over time. If you’re wondering, what is SAP? Don't worry, I got it covered. There is a blog post link below. Definitely give that a read if you are new to SAP world. And how do you get started? Let me break it down real quick.Create your SAP universal ID. This is like your learning passport, so  make sure you use your email address of your university to do so. Verify that you are a student using the email address attached or tied with your enrollment. And while waiting for the activation link to get to your inbox, you can already start checking out the student's Zone and exploring courses and even start learning. You can also activate your subscription by checking your inbox to activate the link. If you don’t see it on your inbox, check the spam folder just in case. and you can also start you can only start learning and pick up from where you left or choose new topics from your student's zone account also you can also start practicing on the cloud-based training systems this is really really important because here you actually switch or you turn your theories into real skills and also you can also join live sections and ask expert questions and also learn what is happening in the field. When you think you're done or when you think you've learned enough, you can already book from the Learning Hub certification exams. Remember, you've got two free attempts. Before I go, just a few quick FAQs. Old student email address won't get you access, so make sure you are actively enrolled. And the subscription lasts for 12 months, But, if you're still enrolled, you can renew it. And remember, the certification exam is only for two attempts if only you pass on the first try. So, you're still unsure where to start? I got it covered. You can check out the Discovery SAP for students or position in SAP business suits. And remember, if you ever get stuck, the SAP community is always there for you. For more information, please check out the blog post. Happy learning and goodluck on your SAP journey. Ciao.

[Witalij] Because of all the troubles, I'm misinforming you that SAP Business Objects BI 2025 is now available. But thanks, Josh, for reminding me. SAP Business Objects BI 2025 brings a fresh set of enhancements that make your business analytics more efficient, user-friendly, and future-proof. BI 2025 offers powerful enhancements designed to help you help your business users make faster and more informed decisions. This release isn't just about the new features. It's about ensuring that your BI platform remains secure, flexible, and ready for the future. Please check the Welcome to SAP Business Objects BI 2025 blog post and share your thoughts in the comments there. And by the way, Greg, Eric, yes, I still have it.

entry.title: Duplicate values in inventory ADSO with non-cumulatives
entry.content:
Hi, guys!

I have an ADSO inventory enabled with non-cumulative ratios; let's call this ADSO A. I copied data from ADSO A to another ADSO (let's call this ADSO B), also inventory enabled with non-cumulative ratios.

Both ADSO have a navigational attribute category that comes from infoobjets 0MATERIAL, and I'm using a Full DTP with a filter in this navigational attribute (0MATERIAL-CATEGORY = 9602). Data load was successful, but not so the values; they are doubling.

For example, in the original ADSO, I have plant R34 with a stock value of $345.89, and in the target ADSO, I have plant R34 with a stock value of $691.78.

The relationship of fields in the transformation is one-to-one, and there is not any ABAP routine.

Any clues? Regards. Oscar

entry.title: Re: The SAP BW Data Product Generator for SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: Great blog..very Informative!!

entry.title: Product Inspiration Series - Experience the New Era of SAP CX
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We're happy to inform you that our Product Inspiration Series for Intelligent CX continues in 2025, with a new set of deep dive videos featuring most recent innovations from our SAP and ISV partners. According to our AI-first and suite-first strategy those videos aim to inspire you on what's possible in the new era of AI agents and seamlessly connected end-to-end processes across SAP Business Suite. 

Thereby the special character of this video series remains unchanged. Each video...

  • covers specific innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio,
  • is made from product or industry experts for experts,
  • typically starts with a short Q&A at the beginning (why, what, how),
  • does not contain any slides (zero slides rule),
  • consists of deep-dive and/or process demos,
  • wants to inspire you by showcasing real software,
  • is produced in 4K to offer a jaw-dropping viewing experience,
  • helps you understand the Consumer Industries & CX product strategy better, 
  • is made with love and dedication for you - our valued customers, partners, colleagues or simply CX enthusiasts.

But now let's have a closer look at the first videos which made it through the finish line...

1. Predictive Planning and Inventory Orchestration from SAP

2. Extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 using No Code / Low Code Tools

3. Sinch Omnichannel Customer Engagement for SAP CX

4. Open Search Service for SAP Commerce Cloud in Action (coming soon)

5. Open Payment Framework for SAP Commerce Cloud in Action (coming soon)

6. Business Information Extraction for SAP Enterprise Service Management (coming soon)

 

7. Intelligent Selling with Joule in SAP Sales Cloud and S/4HANA Cloud in Action (coming soon)

If you have any questions or want to share your feedback please let me know. 

Further videos will be published soon. 🚀

Enjoy and have fun.

entry.title: Possibility of Filter shortcut in smart table column menu in newer SAPUI5 versions after 1.133
entry.content:
Dear All

Is there any way we can get the filter button back in the Column menu of Smart table? This was available in older SAPUI5 versions before 1.133 and now the column menu design has changed. I see sorting & grouping is available, but the filter shortcut is unavailable. We need to click on the settings icon to open the Filter tab in the Personalization menu, which is a couple of extra clicks for the users to reach the filter menu, and they were unhappy with the new column menu after ui5 version update.
PS- I have a Smart Table wrapped around a grid table having custom columns. We are running the apps in BTP launchpad.

Column menu look after version 1.133



Before version 1.133 - This filter shortcut is what I need in column menu.



Any suggestions or possible customizations will be really helpful. 

Thanks & Cheers
Naresh

thanks a lot for this blog.

Just a question regarding the dates to be given to the client. Is it in the service quote that the dates are managed?

Regards, JL

thanks 

aakash

entry.title: Re: Streamlining User Management: Integrating SAP Integration Suite with SAP Cloud Identity Services
entry.content: Yeah, I meant under step 2/3.

entry.title: IDEAS FOR SAP
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I wanted to share an idea about two new SAP product concepts that I think could really add value if developed together: a self-driving enterprise core and an assistant

A self driving enterprise core is focused on system performance. It’s like a self-driving engine for SAP that can monitor, optimize, and even adjust workflows automatically. It helps businesses run more efficiently by reducing manual work and catching problems before they happen.

An assistant focuses on people. It helps users present their work better, communicate more clearly, and share insights easily—especially through integration with Meta Workplace. It’s about making individuals more productive, confident, and visible in their roles.

I believe SAP needs both. Self driving enterprise core improves how the system runs. An assistant improves how people show up and work within it. Together, they offer a balanced approach.

Thanks for reading—happy to talk more if there’s interest.

entry.title: Queries related to QS41
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If there are different entries in QS41 in the test environment and production environment as we can do direct entries in production, if we add/remove certain entries in the lower environment and transport it to production will the data be overwritten or only the changes captured in the TR will be moved to production?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Re: Three Reasons SAP BusinessObjects Still Matters in 2025
entry.content:
Data Mode is the addition we were waiting for since forever 🙂 and I hope more functionalities will be introduced very soon to bring it to the level of other known data preparation tools.

Long Live BO 😀.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business User Guide in English
entry.content:
Hello, 

You can find business information regarding S/4HANA in SAP Signavio Process Navigator:

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/globalSearch?sIsFrom=BusinessProcess&sId=&name=&sSSId=

You will find here Best Practises, test scripts and Process Flows. You can select which wersion of S/4HANA you are using. 

Other information you will find on SAP Help Portal: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9d794cbd48c648bc8a176e422772de7e/7af7b8541486ed05e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

Hope it will help you!

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Email: jagoda.drwiega@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com

Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for movement Message No. IO231
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do a goods receipt of an existing serialized material with equipment status AVLB and the serial level 1 is checked in the material master we get a warning message during check Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for movement Message No. IO231 and during posting an ABAP dump is thrown.

But for the above scenario if we remove the serial level 1 we don't get any ABAP dump during posting. Why so?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Data Necessidade IW32
entry.content: Na transação IW32 na aba componentes preciso habilitar o campo data de necessidade para preenchimento manual na primeira tela, não sendo necessário selecionar o item do material e ir na guia Dados Gerais.

entry.title: Re: DMEEX One format tree for multiple XML files
entry.content:
Hi,

the secret should be hidden in combination of levels and sort/key fields.

You can inspire yourself with a standard XML tree, for example PAYM/CGI_CT - do a Z copy for your experiments.

Level 1 has repetition factor 1 - it means, that you can't have combination of keys for level one on one page.

The key for level 1 is combined from FPAYH-ZBUKR plus something unimportant now.

Activate your Z tree and press the "Test Active Version" button.

In the Test Cockpit create two lines in FPAYH table with same ZBUKR (you should switch to Tech Names first) and press Execute - you should see only one output file.

But when you change the second ZBUKR to a different one, two files should be created.

But this simple rule works only for the first level. For other levels it is a bit more complicated, but not too much. The Repetition Factor for level 2 says how many different keys for level 2 can exist for one level 1 before a new page is created. So you should change the repetition factor for level 2 for example to 2 to make it easier for understanding and have a look what is the key for level 2. It is combined from FPAYH-HKTID and something else. So if you will have 3 lines in FPAYH with the same ZBUKR and different HKTIDs, you should receive in the test tool 2 pages, because only 2 different HKTIDs can be on one page.

When you understand this idea, you should be able to create your own tree.

Best regards,

Antonin

entry.title: Re: Queries related to QS41
entry.content:
Hello, 

Only data, that you have in transport will be moved. In SE10, when you open your transport and objects that are captured in it, you will see data that will be moved from one system to other. Only when you have one field responsible for storing some data it might be overwritten. But when it is an additional entry in table, it will be moved. 

But please remeber, that best way to have your systems compatibale is to make changes in lower system and move it to higher system. It will prevent incompatibility for future. 

Best regards, 

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Email: jagoda.drwiega@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com

Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Goods Receipt of a material
entry.content:
Hello @Jaya0511 ,

At a high level, there is no need for equipment to be in store. But it will depend upon few factors, such as whether you are using serial numbers and whether the equipment was purchased for the first time at that time GR or you are sending the equipment outside your manufacturing unit for refurbishment/repair to a supplier and now posting GR to receive the equipment as material.

If you will elaborate more on business situation, then I can answer better.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Undo Changes with Engineering change Management- CCUNDO
entry.content: @Akshay4547 If you want to assign an object key with a release key, follow the path: Cross-Application Components → Engineering Change Management → Maintain Profile. Then select the profile and click on "Object Type Profile" to maintain the object type. The system will automatically fetch it during change number creation if you create it using a profile.

entry.title: Re: SIT and UAT Tests Scripts in S4HPC project
entry.content:
Hello, 

In each Item Scope in Process Navigator you will find tests scrips respective to each process:

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502?region=DE

All informatin about project managemnt you can find in Road Map Viewer:

https://me.sap.com/roadmapviewer

Regarding WRICEF everything depends what you need to create. Some of the objects are created by respective app, creating cutom fields is also covered by an app in some cases. Reports are highly advanced in Public Cloud as they are in Fiori. On SAP Help Portal you will find documentation regarding creating custom objects: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/7139c1648de84c0bbd7637589ed7c92a.html?locale=en-US

There you might also find answers to your third questin. If you need any more information, feel free to ask.

Regards, 

Jagoda Drwiega | Senior SAP MM Expert

Email: jagoda.drwiega@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com

Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Notificacion de SDI no se genera en reporte S_AHR_610...
entry.content:
Entonces, creo que deberás ingresar un incidente para que el equipo de SAP Soporte verifiqué lo que está ocurriendo. Ya sabes: debes incluir los datos de conexión, usuario con permisos y variante para replicar el caso.

Si haces eso, puedes enviarme un correo con el número de incidente para darle seguimiento.

Saludos, Hugo Rodríguez hu.rodriguez@sap.com

entry.title: Personalization capability of SAP S/4HANA Oil &Gas for Retail fuel network operations(RFNO) solution
entry.content:
Design steps: Configuration/Master Data

Step 1:  Upload the desired image to the MIME repository in the S/4 server

Step 2: Assign image path in RFNO configuration

Step 3:

Assign a picture in the Location Master data

Result: Personalization of RFNO Fiori App

Sample example: Fiori App - Service Station Overview depicting PoS picture

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully-Activated Appliance: Known Issues
entry.content:
Hi @JoergWolf 

Good morning!

We created SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, a fully activated appliance, with the Microsoft Azure Cloud Provider. At the time of activation, one of the servers is issuing an error:

Name: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 & SAP HANA DB 2.0

Size: E32s_v5 ​​(32 cores, 256GB memory, SSD)

VM Status: Active
Software Status: Failed

Log error: Failed Software Details

The software provisioning process has failed on one or more virtual machines. For more information, see the Virtual Machines section in the appliance details. If there are problems with the software, please terminate this appliance and try to create another one.

Region: East US (Virginia)

As we have already re-created it but without success. Can we solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: Personalization capability of SAP S/4HANA Oil &Gas for Retail fuel network operations(RFNO)
entry.content: This blog highlights the personalization capability of SAP S/4HANA Oil & Gas's Retail fuel network operations (RFNO) solution for the PoS location settlement business. The SAP standard RFNO solution Fiori App can display a picture depicting business sentiments in the form of a Point of Sale or company logo.

entry.title: Re: IP10 Maintenance schedule plan process
entry.content:
Hello @Sagar11 ,

1. The end date and end counter are not considered during the scheduling process if you have selected the Outline Agreement checkbox for the maintenance plan category in Customizing for Plant Maintenance and Customer Service under Maintenance Plans, Work Centers, Task Lists and PRTs  Maintenance Plans  Set Maintenance Plan Categories. Moreover, the system does not consider the end date or end counter if the maintenance call object is a service order.

2. Did you activate the business function to have call horizon in days? Test it in a system where business function is not activated. If it works there, then the issue may be related to the business function. Then please raise it with SAP.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Joule in SAC and S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello. I want to ask, did anyone know is joule already available at SAP Analytics Cloud ? If yes is there any guide how to connect it?

 

Also for joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition , can joule show a bar chart or line chart ? Cause when i try its cannot

entry.title: Re: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content: Bottom line is that CR works fine within our apps, but the glitch is preventing us from creating new reports. Since SAP is no longing supporting CR with paid support, it seems to us that it would be unwise to coninue with CR. In the long run we will switch to the DevExpress report generater but it will take time to convert over 300 reports. If we need a new report, then DevExpress will be used. Thank you for all of your help over the years and good luck to you in your future endevers.

entry.title: Re: CR reports cannot connect to SQL Server database
entry.content: Endevors.

entry.title: Re: Sap Mobile Services Client enforce browser for corpor...
entry.content:
Hello,

Regarding being able to enforce only Edge during browser calls, there are some documented alternatives that can be done on Intune's side. Therefore, please make sure to check with your Intune's expert or responsible to clarify the possible alternatives there.

See similar threads, for reference:

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/answers/questions/254032/intune-android-default-browser
https://eskonr.com/2019/03/how-to-make-edge-browser-as-default-browser-on-mobile-os-for-managed-apps/

entry.title: Re: remove multiple test cases ALM Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, PAULOMORAISIG,

It seems there is no option for mass deletion of Test Cases.  

You can submit ideas for any ideas you have for SAP Cloud ALM at:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3525

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Transformation Center: End to End Digita...
entry.content: This is a blog rather than a question.

entry.title: Re: Cache cleanup in SAP BTP HTML5 Applications
entry.content: In workzone, you can do content refresh. After each deployment you have to manually click the refresh button in the HTML5 Apps line of the Content Channels

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM Event Notification Recipients templates for...
entry.content:
Hi, Bastian,
Health Monitoring even configuration does not allow a variant (template) to be used for setup -> at this time.
You can add your ideas in 

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3525

Perhaps Idea:

Alert Management Templates

Request ID: 316553
would meet your needs or you can log your own request.

entry.title: Project Sap Public Cloud
entry.content: I want a sample project (task schedule) for sap public cloud

entry.title: Re: Delegating workflows only to the users above delegator's position hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi @Dharmin_Thakkar,

How are you?! I know you wrote this one a while ago! Is there anyway to prevent the delegator to delegate to a peer's direct report? In your example, how to prevent Charles Braun from delegating to someone that reports to Lisa Clark? Any thoughts?

We need new functions for Position Management!

Kind regards,

Cristiana

entry.title: Prevent Extra Rows/Weeks from Showing in SinglePlanningCalendar (Month View)
entry.content:
I have a TypeScript application that uses a SinglePlanningCalendar in Month View.  I see 6 weeks showing for April 2025, for example.  April 30th is in the 5th row and I don't want the "extra" week to be showing.
I've tried all sorts of things to hide the row, including trying to get the parent and remove the child from the parent but nothing seems to be working.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Filter Value Help list on the child entity record based on the value from the parent entity record
entry.content:
I'm developing an SAP Fiori application using the RAP model. In my scenario, I'm creating a new record for a child entity. For one of the fields, I needed to implement a value help for lookup functionality. I was able to achieve this using the @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation, as shown below—and it works as expected.

What I’m aiming to do is filter the Value Help list based on a value passed from the parent entity record. When the user clicks on the Help Value (F4) for the field, the Value Help window should open, and the search field should automatically be pre-populated with the value passed from the parent entity record. For example, in the screenshot below, the Value Help window displays the Business Partner search field along with other fields. I want the Business Partner field to be automatically populated with the value "777", which is the value passed from the parent entity record.

 

What’s the recommended approach to implement this kind of filtering?

entry.title: Re: Connecting from SAP Datasphere to S/4HANA & (OnPremise/Cloud)SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

My client is having Datasphere and there is a use case where they want to leverage some data to be written from HANA cloud into S4. Would anyone be interested in providing some useful insights if Datasphere can help here somehow or we should look for DP agent?

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP BTP destination REST API integration -...
entry.content:
Hi, I had the same problem and found that the /oauth/token was missing from the BTP Destination Token URL.

It needs to be set as: 'tokenServiceURL': f"{AICORE_AUTH_URL}/oauth/token

entry.title: Fiori RAP: Define Sort Order for Value Help
entry.content: I’m developing an SAP Fiori application using the RAP model. In my scenario, I have a CDS entity that provides the data for the Value Help. The screenshot below shows the Value Help window with the data. I would like to specify the sort order for the Value Help, so that when the list is displayed, the line items will be sorted in ascending order based on the first column. Is there a RAP annotation that can be used to define the sorting order?

entry.title: Re: AUC partial capitalization not completely using prior year acquisition first
entry.content:
Hi Vaughanw, removed SAP Project and Resource Management tag after discussing with expert.You may find details for using tags in Blog below: 

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to get your answer faster!Regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: MDK - How to change the AccessoryType Icon on Grid ta...
entry.content:
Many thanks Bill

so basically you mean to have an image that looks like a checkbox and then swap the image every time the user click on the row?I have seen this workaround proposed a few years back however I cannot find any sample code for it which I found strange since it must be a common thing people ask for... Would you be able to provide any sample code or refer to any place where there is a sample code for this? 

On the other hand are you aware if following missing features( please correct me if I am wrong on any of them) are coming anytime soon in MDK for grid/data tables ?

- Multi select/single select

- Custom AccessoryType Icon

- Button type cell with event handler

- Checkbox cell with event handler

- Header in Grid/Data Table to be able to add buttons or change AccesoryType Icon so we can add edit/add/delete buttons if needed specially on iPads.

- Footer in Grid/Data table to be able to add cells instead of just 1 label so we can do add Totals to the table 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Only Active records when using Termination
entry.content:
Hi @DariusSoreata,

The If clause in the measure formula is used to filter certain termination where their event reason is mapped under Excluded category in Separation Reason dimension so they won't be counted in the measure.  Trying to remove that exclusion logic does not have anything to do with Termination showing with Active status.  Besides, there is no event reason mapped under Exclude category in Separation Reason, so that exclusion does not exclude any Terminations:

As for Termination showing with active status, the only explanation I have is with termination date logic.  When minus 1 day logic is used, the termination is reported on effective start date - 1 day and on this day, the employment status is still Active. 

The screen shot in your post showed termination in 2025.  When you say the employee already terminated a few months ago, is it still within 2025?  If still within 2025 then they will show on WFA site for Termination in 2025 with Active status.

entry.title: Re: SDMI CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2
entry.content:
Hello

I did not received any solution from SAP CASE about 3 weeks, too. 
That was why I bypassed this issue. (As anyone knows, any project has a deadline)

I cannot see the class CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2 in SDM_MON, maybe.

I implemented notes 3224007 & 3533713, and modified the PROTECT field in BUT0BK with HR ABAP developer in my team.
It made me bypass SQL Query of CL_SDM_BUT0BK_V2.

Please note that this is not the method recommended by SAP.

entry.title: Re: Annotations for Sort Order in value help not working
entry.content:
Does anyone know if this is possible yet?
Thanks for any update if there is one. 

This is a really frustrating shortcoming for so long.

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_CUST201 When posting in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app,
entry.content:
We are currently testing the operation in a starter environment.
When I post in the Create Outgoing Invoices (FB70) app, I get the following error:
I checked the Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes.
At 0L, accounting principles were assigned to company codes.

Which configuration activities should I check?
Also, I would like to know if there are any notes that are useful for setting.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Correct the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal
Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST201

Diagnosis
There are inconsistencies in the Customizing settings for ledgers for the universal journal.

System Response
To prevent database mismatches, postings are not allowed as long as the customizing settings are not consistent.

Procedure
Check the Customizing settings using transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK.

If this message was displayed during a posting activity, use transaction FINS_CUST_CONS_CHK_P to check the specific Customizing settings for the relevant company codes and ledgers.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: Not able to update the values in S4Hana public with PUT method
entry.content: Hi, Jerry, Using a PATCH worked! Thank you for suggesting a lot of possibility, but your first thought was right. I would like to accept your comment as a solution, so could you make an answer not comment?

entry.title: Re: Project and Resource Management
entry.content:
Hello there,

For the test, you could follow the test scripts within below scope items by navigating to Accelerators tab, download the Test script.
Resource Management for Projects (6JO)
https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/6JO
Collaborative Project Management(6JN)
https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/6JN

For the configuration, please either get the Set-up instructions from the same location in above scope items or we have blogs for Resource Management:

Setup Resource Management Capability in SAP Projects and Resource Management
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/setup-resource-management-capability-in-sap-projects-and-resource/ba-p/13999829

Integrate Resource Management Capability in SAP Project and Resource Management with SAP Master Data
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/integrate-resource-management-capability-in-sap-project-and-resource/ba-p/13991526

Thanks and best regards,
Dianne

entry.title: Re: Replacement of Core Tool functionalities by functionalities in Cockpit Fiori apps as of SAP CC 2
entry.content:
Hi Abhijeet,

Thank you for your reply. This information will be very helpful. 

Regards

Grace

entry.title: SAP MDK Object table Single Select mode instead of multi select mode
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I would like to activate single-selection mode for an Object table, similar to the functionality available for a Picklist. However, so far I've only been able to find the multi-selection option.

Is single-select mode currently supported for Object tables? If not, what would be the recommended approach or workaround to achieve similar functionality?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Guide to upgrade BRIM system from S/4 1809 to the lat...
entry.content: Hi Ing_Nap,

entry.title: Re: #CoE#HSQC if app Upload Material Inventory Price can...
entry.content:
Yes you do have to manually enter the materials and the other corresponding field values one by one manually to process it. Alternatively, please consider utilizing IRPA to process multiple materials. I would recommend you to create a CIP request for to mass update the price. Thanks.

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Re: Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in approval
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes. It is not possible to call oData API to update sales document when it is in approval. You could manually withdraw the workflow and update the indicator "Fixed Data and Qty", or set the indicator "Fixed Data and Qty" by default. 

In future, we would have functionality planned to withdraw workflow via API call. Please stay tuned on roadmap update. 

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionでAPI連携で合計実際原価を反映させる方法について
entry.content:
API の中のデータを確認してみるのがいいと思います。
まずは ブラウザの Developer Tools で確認してみてください。
https://weseek.co.jp/tech/4176/https://weseek.co.jp/tech/4176/

entry.title: Compensation Statement Acknowledgement Using WalkMe
entry.content:
A question we often get asked by customers is how they can track compensation statement views and better yet employee acknowledgement of their statement outcomes.  In certain countries, the acknowledgement of statements is not only a business necessity but also a legal requirement.  Using standard SuccessFactors functionality this requirement presents some challenges but by using WalkMe tools, building out this requirement becomes easy.

WalkMe is a Digital Adoption Platform that can help organisations drive productivity and navigate changing technology landscapes and business processes.  In this use case, we have built out a guided user experience for the employee to view and acknowledge a SuccessFactors Compensation statement.

WalkMe functionality used to build this demo includes

  • Shout Outs
  • Standard design templates
  • Smart Walk Through Automation

Tracking and reporting on views and clicks is automatic through WalkMe’s Insights Dashboards.  There are ready built reports as well as the ability to create custom dashboards and these can be distributed to key stakeholders on a schedule if required.

Additional Notes:

  • WalkMe custom configuration as seen in the demo video does require additional WalkMe licences
  • Standard WalkMe content embedded in SuccessFactors is available with the H1 2025 release and does not require an additional license.  Details of standard content can be found in the H1 2025 What’s New Viewer
  • The demo video contains a custom SuccessFactors Compensation statement.  The same acknowledgement functionality is also possible using a standard statement.

Special thanks to my WalkMe colleague Paul Casaneanu for helping to showcase the WalkMe functionality as it pertains specifically to the compensation module.

entry.title: Publish Data to SOLACE using AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi All,

This blog will explain steps to be able to publish data to SOLACE queue/topic using AMQP adapter

AMQP supports TCP/ web socket protocols only. I have used the TCP protocol for this case. Always, go for the connectivity test before you move forward with the actual channel configurations for AMQP.

The authentication methods for AMQP is different from other adapters.

AMQP receiver has below authentication methods:

1. None 2. SASL 3. OAuth Client Creds

AMQP sender has below authentication methods:

1. None 2. Client Certificate 3. SASL

I have used SASL as the authentication method in my case.

Push Data to SOLACE using AMQP (used in case of cloud connector is needed)

Create a demo IFLOW with the timer to trigger flow on deployment & have some static value on body in the content modifier to pass as message to the queue.

The AMQP has proxy feature (CC) which is currently missing in the AEM adapter.

Provide the connection details from the solace details captured from below:

Provide the topic or queue name used to push message

Testing:

Once it’s deployed the message is sent to Queue/topic in solace

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Consume Data from SOLACE using AMQP
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please check my previous blog on how to push data to SOLACE using AMQP sender adapter.

Publish Data from AMQP to SOLACE 

Pull Data from SOLACE using AMQP (used in case of cloud connector is needed)

Create a demo IFLOW with sender AMQP adapter

The AMQP has proxy feature (CC) which is currently missing in the AEM adapter.

The headers/properties can be retrieved from the queue using AMQP sender adapter

Provide the connection details from the solace details captured from below:

Provide the topic or queue name used to push message

Testing:

Once it’s deployed the message is consumed from Queue/topic in solace & contents can be seen using CPI helper

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Can you trigger a Business rule for a candidate based on whether they are Internal or External?
entry.content: We have a business rule that we only want to trigger on the application if they are External candidates - is this possible?

entry.title: SAP MDK Font-Style for iOS - change Font size?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to change the Font size on different MDK controls however nothing seems to work.

Based on the documentation we should be able to use CSS attribute font-style: UIFont.textstyle however I am not able to find any place where it mentions what are the valid values under that type? I have found an Apple documentation that has some constants like "extraLargeTitle" however that doe not seem to work on a simplepropertycell or objectheader title that I tried.

Could you please advice the possible values for that CSS attribute and if it is possible indeed to change the font type/size on iOS devices ?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP MDK Title/Sections
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am trying to create sections within my app, something like a big title and then following controls to be indented or at last without empty margin/padding to show really clear controls underneath are part the the section..

So far I have used Header object which works well if you added at the beginning of the page and you have only 1 more control underneath since following control you add is nicely indented without extra grey padding between them. However if I do the same thing after( for instance a new Object Title below the last control ) then there is no indentation and following control is separated by  a grey area. I know that each control can have each own heading but what I am looking for is more like a section big title kind of heading that shows really clear the following controls are part of that title/section and ideally they should be indented  or at least do not have the grey separation area between each control... Please advice what is the best practice here..

entry.title: SLT logging table not getting deleted /1CADMC/<DIGITS>
entry.content:
SLT logging table /1CADMC/<DIGITS> not getting deleted and around 1.5 billlion entries in the tables. 

We have new SLT system and probably this entries is from old SLT butt don't know how to get this logging table deleted. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SLT logging table not getting deleted /1CADMC/<DIGITS>
entry.content: Please follow KBA http://me.sap.com/notes/3006239 for the solution.

entry.title: Database table for business volume data is stored for a condition contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Below are the questions i need support on if anyone has worked on custom changes in condition contract settlement process.

Q1.What is the database table in which the Business Volume data is stored for a condition contract(The billing documents and quantities).I need to build a custom logic to fetch the data and perform some calculations on it but i am struggling to fine.

Q2.If we create custom fields in a condition contract header, is it possible to use those fields in a pricing routine or the fields absolutelty need to be part of the pricing structure?

Thanks,

entry.title: Is there a walkaround to upload excel with different Date columns in Upload Job Starter in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We create an Upload Job using the excel file that contains columns [202501,202502,....,202512] like this:

When we want to use Upload Job Starter in story to upload the excel file that contains columns[202601,202602,...,202612], it fails. We understand that's because the columns are not same as the one already mapped in Upload Job. But is there any walkaround to meet our requirement? We don't want to create another Upload Job because we have lots of files need to upload so we have to create lots of jobs. We figured out a walkaround to tranposed the column like the picture below but it's also challenging for us to apply this considering the data volume.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: 关于 SAP 公有云（S/4HANA Cloud）的销售数据锁定
entry.content: 非常感谢，请问一下业务锁定有具体的APP吗？

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create new Migration Object using M...
entry.content:
Hi @naresha5892 

The SAP S/4HANA migration object modeler is an application that can be used to enhance the migration objects that are used in the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. This app cannot be used to create a new Migration object.

Note: Using the app Migration Object Modeler, it is only possible to enhance certain migration objects that are released by SAP.

There is an SAP Note for each migration object that details the structures and fields that can be enhanced for each migration object. These SAP Notes can be accessed from SAP Note 2999428.

For detailed information, as well as an example for the migration object Supplier, see:

  • https://www.sap.com/documents/2022/07/9457651c-377e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: How to Represent Supplier Discount as an Isolated Item in Purchase Order (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to represent a supplier discount as an isolated item with a negative price in a purchase order. However, based on the information I've gathered, it seems that creating an item with a negative price is not supported in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

As an alternative, I used the condition type to represent the discount. However, this leads to the following challenges:

  1. The discount is distributed across all PO items, but our customer requires that the discount not affect the material prices.

  2. The discount is no longer displayed as a separate line item in the PO, since it is split among the items.

Is there a workaround or best practice to show the total discount amount separately—perhaps at the end of the PO output? Would using the Livecycle help achieve this?

Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Where can I found the Customer - extend existing reco...
entry.content:
Hi @Ingrid_at_Applium 

I have searched in Available Migration Objects page and able to find this object.

As per help portal, Migration object Customer - extend existing record by multiple addresses is available in the approach 'Migrate Data Using Staging Tables'.

Are you using the approach other than staging table ('Migrate Data Directly from SAP System')? 

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: Split Valuation in SAP MM
entry.content: No need to activate split valuation every time it's activated by default if not go to transaction code Omw0 and activate it just once

entry.title: Re: Implementation of GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET in SAP RAP framework
entry.content: Hi Andre, the information of restriction of custom entities on expaned_entity is very useful, thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: hello @shruthi_j_b  Can we create a custom business catalog in sap public cloud ? and use it in Custom catalog extension by creating a application ?

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content:
Hello Harsha,

I believe you are adding trigger in CronJobs. You have to add into the JOB. Can you try below impex. Hope this should solve your problem

 

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger ; Job(code)[unique=true] ; cronExpression;relative[default=false];active[default=true];maxAcceptableDelay[default=-1]
; "sync productCatalog:Staged->Online";"0 0 3 * * ?";;;

 

Thank you

Vinay Kumar Samudrala

entry.title: s/4h Cloud Public is it possible to derivate the credit segment dynamically in sales orders?
entry.content:
I know that EXIT_SAPFV45K_001 is not available in s/4h Cloud Public Edition. Is there any other option to derivate dynamically the credit segment in sales order?

For my project it is not enough derivate the credit segment by sales area. We have multiples sales area for sales and distribution pupposess and split them to derivate different credit segments will increase the sales areas.

Please you help, I appreciate

entry.title: Re: Business process throwing could not translate value e...
entry.content:
First you get the CMSSiteModel. Then rertieve the Default catalog and its versions.

 

CMSSiteModel cmssitemodel = (CMSSiteModel) spring.getBean("cartDAO").getCartWithCode("1234567").getSite()
cmssitemodel.getDefaultCatalog().getCatalogVersions()

 

This works.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content: Hi Bill, We are using SAP MDK 24.11.2-002. Yes we did look into additional search options but it is not working.

entry.title: Re: Different number ranges for sales document type and b...
entry.content:
Please check the Blog.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/custom-logic-to-implement-flexible-billing-document-numbering/ba-p/13565524

entry.title: Re: Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for...
entry.content:
Hi Priti,

Open the long text of the message and the long text will show the potential issue. Furthermore, in the long text you will find a keyword "analysis" which will have a hyperlink. This will take you to a another message pop-up that will show you the inconsistency between the data of serial number in question and the goods movement data of the same serial number with the deviation that is leading to the error.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content: Hi Bill, The issue is happening on both android and iOS. Scenario: User navigates to the Notification List. After clicking on a particular notification user navigates to notifcation detail screen. Once user comes back to Notification List the initially tapped notification is not showing swipe behaviour. Once I refresh the page, the swipe behaviour starts working.

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content: Also I am not able to upload any code snippet or screen recording of the issue we are facing.

entry.title: Re: Automatically trigger synchronization of product cata...
entry.content:
Hello,

Firstly we can add trigger directly to this kind of sync job. 

INSERT_UPDATE Trigger; job(code)[unique = true]               ; cronExpression
                     ; sync ****ProductCatalog\:Staged->Online ; 0 */3 * ? * *

You need to provide a escape character as above so that impex works!! 

Please test.

entry.title: Re: Connectivity Proxy Upgrade to 2.13.0
entry.content: I upgrade my connectivity proxy to version 2.14.0, same issue:

entry.title: Re: Permission to enable "Principal Permission Action" button in Backoffice without admin
entry.content:
Hello

'Principal permission action' - do you mean assign permissions option available for users/usergroups/types ?

this is enabled only for Admin i think. otherwise you need to rewrite function and assign access to another usergroup.

entry.title: Re: Native HANA / XSA CDS - annotation for 'measure'
entry.content:
i think you can build a calculation view, which can do the job easily.

or you can use cap

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#aggregation-methods

entry.title: Re: Database table for business volume data is stored for...
entry.content:
Hi Priya,

Q1: Business volume will be stored in Business volume profile table. For Standard sales rebate, business volume table is VWB2_VBRKVBRP_1. To fetch the business volume for specific agreement, you need to pass the Business Volume selection criteria into this table.

Q2: Needs more info. If your business is using the Accruals posting from the customer billing document, then the custom field should be in the billing document and settlement document. If not, custom should be only in settlement document for the price calculation. Check if you want to add the custom field into Condition Contract header or Business volume selection criteria or the Pricing structure as the architecture of the condition contract is bit different from the ECC rebates.

Regards

Hari 

Regards

Hari

entry.title: Re: Discrete Vs repetitive Vs Process Industry in SAP PP
entry.content: Nicely written blog and lots of information

entry.title: 𝘿𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙂𝙖𝙢𝙚 I𝓷vite Code 3488815781035 – Best I𝓷vite Code for New Users
entry.content:
Want to get free bonus coins in 𝘿𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙂𝙖𝙢𝙚? Here is the working I𝓷vite Code for you to use and grab your rewards quickly.

Official 𝘿𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙣 I𝓷vite Code:

→ 3488815781035

Use this special I𝓷vite code while signing up on 𝘿𝙖𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙂𝙖𝙢𝙚 App to receive bonus cash in your wallet.

entry.title: Re: ObjectTable swipe behaviour not working
entry.content:
Hi,

//deselect the row before nav. to detail page.

context.getPageProxy().getControl('YourObjectTableSection').getSelectedItems().forEach(item => item.setSelected(false));

Thanks
